---
title: "2025-W15"
---


- [world] [ How a deep-cover KGB spy recruited his own son](https://www.theguardian.com/news/2025/apr/10/deep-cover-kgb-spy-recruited-son-peter-herrmann-illegals)

   The Americans irl

- [tech] [Fintech founder charged with fraud after AI shopping app found to be powered by humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)

- [space] [Suni Williams running a marathon in space](https://www.espn.in/espn/story/_/id/44192592/astronaut-suni-williams-starliner-runs-international-space-station-return-earth)
